name: Energy Drinks / Caffeine

dosing: A full energy drink (Red Bull, Monster, or similar) chugged quickly at onset is the most common approach
5-Hour Energy shots are popular for their small volume and fast intake
Strong coffee or espresso works but is slower to prepare; some combine caffeine with other abortives for a stronger effect
preparations: Drink the full can or shot as fast as possible at attack onset; sipping slowly is far less effective
Ice-cold drinks are preferred by many as the cold itself provides additional relief
Keep energy drinks stocked at bedside and in your car so they are always within reach
schedule: Use at the very first sign of an attack as a first-line quick abortive
Combine with high-flow oxygen for a faster and more reliable abort
Also useful for shadows and low-level pain between full attacks, and as a bridge during triptan detox before busting

sideEffects: Only temporary relief lasting hours at best
Diminishing returns as a cycle intensifies
Sleep disruption when used for nighttime attacks
Ineffective for some users or after prolonged use
